description: Sector overlay for U.S. pharmaceutical manufacturing, drug approval, labeling, cGMP, distribution, controlled-substance, pharmacovigilance, and supply-chain documentation.

metadata.scope: United States sector overlay controls for Pharmaceuticals. Intended to be used with us/core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from U.S. federal statutes, regulations, agency guidance, regulator materials, and sector frameworks available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance. State, territorial, tribal, and local obligations may impose additional requirements.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: FDA pharmaceutical inspections and compliance materials
FDA current good manufacturing practice regulations
FDA drug approval and labeling materials
Drug Supply Chain Security Act materials

rules.title: FDA approval, listing, or drug-application evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for FDA approval, NDA, ANDA, BLA, drug listing, NDC, or marketing authorization evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, federal/state interaction, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: FDA drug approval and labeling materials

rules.title: CGMP quality-system and manufacturing-control evidence is documented
rules.summary: Checks for CGMP, quality unit, batch record, validation, deviation, CAPA, stability, or manufacturing-control evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, federal/state interaction, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: FDA pharmaceutical inspections and compliance materials

rules.title: DEA controlled-substance registration or handling controls are documented where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for DEA registration, controlled substance, schedule, inventory, controlled-substance recordkeeping, or diversion controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, federal/state interaction, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Drug supply-chain traceability or verification evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for DSCSA, product identifier, transaction information, verification, suspect product, or authorized trading partner evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, federal/state interaction, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: FDA Drug Supply Chain Security Act materials
